# v2.0.5

## Changes

- Removed the task table from dashboard run details so the page focuses on review findings.
- Kept task data in storage and APIs for internal debugging.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.5-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.5-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
